questions.text:
From: Senior Manager
To: Project Team
Subject: Handling the Recent Delay

Dear Team,

The current project delay is affecting our delivery schedule. Please share your thoughts on immediate steps we can take to get back on track. Include any ideas for reallocating team members or requesting additional support from other departments.

Regards,
James Harrington

From: HR Coordinator
To: All Staff
Subject: Agenda Suggestions for Office Meeting

Hello Everyone,

We are organizing an office meeting to address recent project challenges. Send your ideas for discussion points, particularly on managing delays and improving team coordination.

Thank you,
Sophie Laurent
